title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 9–12, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: PURSUE MOMONOSURE!! That is all that matters!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Wuohh!! What a man, that Kanjuro!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Alright!! We'll help save him too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Don't lose focus of our goal

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There are only seven in the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: The greatest swordsman in the world

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The current empress of Amazon Lily

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Along with the man I mentioned earlier...

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
